description: Safari crate created with history parser for History.db using Core Data timestamps
steps: Add plist = '1' to [workspace.dependencies] in root Cargo.toml
Create crates/browser-safari/Cargo.toml with deps: anyhow, browser-core, rusqlite, serde_json, serde, plist; dev-deps: tempfile
Add 'crates/browser-safari' to workspace members in root Cargo.toml
Create crates/browser-safari/src/lib.rs with pub mod history; pub use history::parse_history;
Implement safari_to_unix_ns(core_data_secs: f64) -> i64 using offset 978_307_200.0
Query: SELECT i.url, i.visit_count, v.visit_time FROM history_visits v JOIN history_items i ON v.history_item = i.id WHERE v.visit_time > 0 ORDER BY v.visit_time ASC
Test: parse_single_safari_url — browser=Safari, artifact=History, attrs[url] and attrs[visit_count] correct
